nodes.name: Filter Rows Needing Processing
nodes.notes: Add a 'Status Change Processed' column to the Bookings sheet (beyond AX) that tracks the last Status this workflow already handled, so edits are only acted on once.

parameters.subject: Your Velor meeting has been cancelled
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $('Parse Rows To Objects').item.json['Full Name'].split(' ')[0] }},

Your Velor meeting on {{ $('Parse Rows To Objects').item.json['Meeting Date'] }} at {{ $('Parse Rows To Objects').item.json['Start Time'] }} ET has been cancelled.

{{ $('Parse Rows To Objects').item.json['Cancellation Reason'] ? 'Reason: ' + $('Parse Rows To Objects').item.json['Cancellation Reason'] : '' }}

Reply to this email if you would like to rebook.

Velor Digital

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { valueInputOption: 'RAW', data: [ { range: 'Bookings!AZ' + ($('Parse Rows To Objects').item.json.rowNumber) + ':AZ' + ($('Parse Rows To Objects').item.json.rowNumber), values: [[ 'Cancelled' ]] }, { range: 'Bookings!AK' + ($('Parse Rows To Objects').item.json.rowNumber) + ':AK' + ($('Parse Rows To Objects').item.json.rowNumber), values: [[ $now.toISO() ]] } ] } }}

nodes.name: Compute New Meeting Window
nodes.notes: Team enters the new Meeting Date / Start Time directly in the sheet before setting Status = Rescheduled.

parameters.subject: Your Velor meeting has been rescheduled
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $('Compute New Meeting Window').item.json['Full Name'].split(' ')[0] }},

Your Velor meeting has been rescheduled.

Previous time: {{ $('Compute New Meeting Window').item.json['Rescheduled From'] || 'see original confirmation' }}

New time: {{ $('Compute New Meeting Window').item.json['Meeting Date'] }} at {{ $('Compute New Meeting Window').item.json['Start Time'] }} ET

Velor Digital

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { valueInputOption: 'RAW', data: [ { range: 'Bookings!AZ' + ($('Compute New Meeting Window').item.json.rowNumber) + ':AZ' + ($('Compute New Meeting Window').item.json.rowNumber), values: [[ 'Rescheduled' ]] }, { range: 'Bookings!AK' + ($('Compute New Meeting Window').item.json.rowNumber) + ':AK' + ($('Compute New Meeting Window').item.json.rowNumber), values: [[ $now.toISO() ]] } ] } }}

={{ { valueInputOption: 'RAW', data: [ { range: 'Bookings!AZ' + ($('Parse Rows To Objects').item.json.rowNumber) + ':AZ' + ($('Parse Rows To Objects').item.json.rowNumber), values: [[ 'Done' ]] }, { range: 'Bookings!AK' + ($('Parse Rows To Objects').item.json.rowNumber) + ':AK' + ($('Parse Rows To Objects').item.json.rowNumber), values: [[ $now.toISO() ]] } ] } }}

nodes.name: HTTP: Log Status Change
nodes.notes: References Parse Rows To Objects directly — n8n's pairedItem lineage resolves this correctly regardless of which of the 3 branches (Cancelled/Rescheduled/Done) reached this shared node.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ { values: [ [ $now.toISO(), $('Parse Rows To Objects').item.json['Booking ID'], $execution.id, 'STATUS_CHANGED', $('Parse Rows To Objects').item.json['Status'], 1, '', $('Parse Rows To Objects').item.json['Booking ID'], '1.0.0' ] ] } }}
